topics.name: Counting to 10
topics.desc: Count objects, recognize numbers 1-10, count forward

topics.name: Counting to 20
topics.desc: Count objects 11-20, ten frames, number order

topics.name: Counting to 100
topics.desc: Count by 1s to 100, fill in missing numbers, hundred chart

topics.name: Comparing Numbers
topics.desc: More/less/equal, greater than/less than, compare groups

topics.name: Addition to 5
topics.desc: Add with pictures, number bonds to 5, add 0

topics.name: Addition to 10
topics.desc: Add with pictures, number lines, number bonds to 10

topics.name: Subtraction to 5
topics.desc: Take away with pictures, subtract 0, number bonds

topics.name: Subtraction to 10
topics.desc: Subtract with pictures, number lines, word problems

topics.name: Shapes
topics.desc: 2D shapes (circle, square, triangle, rectangle, hexagon), 3D shapes (sphere, cube, cone, cylinder)

topics.name: Measurement
topics.desc: Longer/shorter, heavier/lighter, taller/shorter, compare sizes

topics.name: Money
topics.desc: Identify pennies, nickels, dimes; count coins to 25¢

topics.name: Time
topics.desc: O'clock, daily schedule, morning/afternoon/night

topics.name: Sorting & Patterns
topics.desc: Sort by shape/color/size, AB/ABB/ABC patterns, what comes next

topics.name: Intro to Multiplication
topics.desc: Equal groups, count by 2s and 5s, how many in all (2 groups of 3)

topics.name: Intro to Division
topics.desc: Fair sharing, split into equal groups, how many in each group

topics.name: Addition to 10
topics.desc: Basic facts, doubles, near doubles, add 0, commutative property

topics.name: Addition to 20
topics.desc: Make ten to add, add 3 numbers, word problems, balance equations

topics.name: Subtraction to 10
topics.desc: Basic facts, subtract 0, fact families, number lines

topics.name: Subtraction to 20
topics.desc: Use ten to subtract, count back, word problems, balance equations

topics.name: Addition to 100
topics.desc: 2-digit + 1-digit, 2-digit + 2-digit, with/without regrouping

topics.name: Subtraction to 100
topics.desc: 2-digit minus 1-digit, 2-digit minus 2-digit, regrouping

topics.name: Addition to 1000
topics.desc: 3-digit addition, with/without regrouping, word problems

topics.name: Subtraction to 1000
topics.desc: 3-digit subtraction, with/without regrouping, word problems

topics.name: Place Value
topics.desc: Tens/ones, hundreds, thousands, expanded form, value of a digit

topics.name: Skip Counting & Patterns
topics.desc: By 2s, 5s, 10s, 100s, forward/backward, sequences

topics.name: Even & Odd Numbers
topics.desc: Identify, sort, patterns, number lines

topics.name: Comparing & Ordering
topics.desc: Compare to 100/1000, greater/less, order numbers

topics.name: Word Problems
topics.desc: Addition/subtraction, comparison, two-step, mixed operations

topics.name: Multiplication
topics.desc: Equal groups, arrays, repeated addition, skip counting, word problems, times tables 1-5

topics.name: Division
topics.desc: Fair sharing, equal groups, divide by 2/3/4/5, word problems, connection to multiplication

topics.name: Fractions
topics.desc: Halves, thirds, fourths, equal parts, fraction of a shape, fraction of a group

topics.name: Money
topics.desc: Coin values, count mixed coins, dollar bills, make change, word problems

topics.name: Time
topics.desc: Analog/digital clocks, to hour/half/quarter/5 min, AM/PM, elapsed time

topics.name: Measurement
topics.desc: Inches, centimeters, feet, compare/estimate lengths, word problems

topics.name: Data & Graphs
topics.desc: Tally charts, bar graphs, pictographs, line plots, read/create

topics.name: Geometry
topics.desc: 2D/3D shapes, sides/vertices, symmetry, partition shapes

topics.name: Number Names & Estimation
topics.desc: Word names to 1000, Roman numerals, rounding, estimation

hint.strategy: Teaching approach name (e.g. 'near doubles', 'count on', 'draw it out')
hint.script: Full voice script that teaches how to solve this specific question

per_question.encourage: Encouragement phrase spoken on correct answer

build_order: Math first (both grades) → Language Arts → Science → Social Studies → Spelling
notes: Multiplication and Division included for BOTH grades per Pastor Taiwo's request. K gets intro level (equal groups, sharing). 2nd Grade gets full tables 1-5 and division concepts.
